findings.evidence: `rg -n "^(/--|def |abbrev |theorem )" TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Subcomodule.lean` shows `theorem mem_submoduleCoactionRange` at line 47 with no preceding `/-- ... -/` docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring explaining that membership in the range is equivalent to being the image of some tensor in `P ⊗ C`.
findings.issue: `mem_submoduleCoactionRange` is a public membership characterization for `submoduleCoactionRange` but has no docstring.

findings.evidence: `nl -ba TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/Comodule/Subcomodule.lean` shows `theorem isSubcomodule_iff` at lines 66-72 without a preceding docstring.
findings.fix: Add a docstring stating that `IsSubcomodule P` is equivalent to every coaction of an element of `P` being represented by an element of `P ⊗ C`.
findings.issue: `isSubcomodule_iff` is the exported iff-form characterization of the stability predicate but has no docstring.

summary: The new module docstring and core declarations are documented, but exported characterization lemmas are missing docstrings. These are part of the public API for using the new predicate and range definition.
